title: Luffy Breaks Free
description: Enel’s ark becomes an active threat, turning the conflict from a survival game into a race to save Skypiea.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this scene centers on Eneru, Enel, Nami, Luffy, Wyper. Enel’s ark becomes an active threat, turning the conflict from a survival game into a race to save Skypiea.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So why do you still stand?

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: But I see you're barely conscious.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Your distant ancestor... The great warrior Kalgara,

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Why he tried to recover our homelands.

summary: Enel’s ark becomes an active threat, turning the conflict from a survival game into a race to save Skypiea.
